fixtures.purpose: Immutable output from the tagged capability handler for the isolated client contract.

procedure: Clone the upstream repository, detach at commit 9de9c25f620ff7f1ce0fd5457d596052d5159596, and verify tag v2026.7.7.2 peels to that commit.
Clear API_SERVER_MODEL_NAME, select the default profile, and construct APIServerAdapter with configured bearer key fixture-capture-key.
Invoke APIServerAdapter._handle_capabilities with Authorization: Bearer fixture-capture-key, parse the HTTP 200 response body, and preserve the complete returned object.
Serialize the parsed object with two-space JSON indentation and one trailing newline, then record the SHA-256.

semantic_assertions: complete handler response identifies hermes.api_server.capabilities on hermes-agent
fallback model is advertised exactly as hermes-agent
bearer authentication is required
chat completions and streaming are enabled
additive runtime, feature, and endpoint fields are preserved in the immutable capture

fixtures.purpose: Canonical complete chat-completions stream with role, ordered content, tool progress, keepalive, usage, stop, and DONE records.

procedure: Inspect each documented SSE emission branch at the pinned source commit and tag.
Construct one LF-delimited sequence containing role, content, tool progress, keepalive, content, usage with stop, and DONE records in source order.
Replace runtime values with the declared deterministic fixture configuration, preserve one blank line between records, and update the reviewed SHA-256.

semantic_assertions: assistant content deltas remain ordered
tool progress and keepalive records remain non-content events
usage accompanies the stop finish record
DONE follows the finish record as Hermes framing confirmation

fixtures.purpose: Immutable source-derived sequence proving ordered running and completed records with one correlated tool call ID.

procedure: Enumerate official numeric tags and independently verify that annotated tag v2026.7.7.2 peels to commit 9de9c25f620ff7f1ce0fd5457d596052d5159596.
Detach the upstream tree at that commit and inspect the tool start and completion emission branches plus their correlated lifecycle regression test.
Preserve the exact tag-shaped running and completed objects in source order with one toolCallId, then append a valid stop chunk and DONE marker.
Hash the complete immutable LF-delimited byte sequence.

semantic_assertions: running precedes completed
both lifecycle records carry toolCallId call_terminal_1
both lifecycle records name the terminal tool
emoji and label occur only on the running record where tagged source emits them
a valid stop chunk and DONE marker complete the evidence sequence

fixtures.purpose: Immutable source-derived length terminal row with exact lifecycle booleans, output_truncated code, raw ignored error canaries, and DONE framing.

procedure: Detach the upstream repository at the canonical peeled commit and inspect the non-stop finish chunk serializer.
Cross-check the tagged truncation regression for completed false, partial true, and output_truncated.
Preserve the source-shaped length chunk, including raw error canaries that the public contract must discard, followed by DONE.
Hash the complete immutable LF-delimited byte sequence.

semantic_assertions: finish_reason is length
completed is false, partial is true, and failed is false
error_code is output_truncated
raw root and hermes error values are ignored canaries rather than public facts
DONE follows the terminal chunk

fixtures.purpose: Immutable source-derived valid agent-error terminal row with the exact server partial boolean and raw ignored error canaries.

procedure: Detach the upstream repository at the canonical peeled commit and inspect result classification plus the non-stop finish chunk serializer.
Apply the serializer to a deterministic failed result with completed false, partial false, and failed true.
Preserve the source-shaped error chunk, including raw ignored error canaries, followed by DONE.
Hash the complete immutable LF-delimited byte sequence.

semantic_assertions: finish_reason is error
completed is false, partial is false, and failed is true
error_code is agent_error
raw root and hermes error values are ignored canaries rather than public facts
DONE follows the terminal chunk

fixtures.purpose: Immutable source-derived task-exception contradiction retained as an explicit rejection expectation.

procedure: Detach the upstream repository at the canonical peeled commit and inspect the agent-task exception branch.
Follow the branch where result remains None, completed defaults true, and agent_error forces failed true with finish_reason error.
Preserve the contradictory source-shaped chunk with raw ignored error canaries followed by DONE.
Hash the complete immutable LF-delimited byte sequence.

semantic_assertions: finish_reason is error
completed true and failed true form the tagged contradiction
the expected client disposition is HermesProtocolError rather than precedence normalization
raw root and hermes error values are ignored canaries rather than public facts
DONE follows the contradictory terminal chunk

fixtures.purpose: Immutable design-derived terminal rows for approved omissions, bounded unknown safe codes, and explicit null rejection.

procedure: Inspect the canonical tagged terminal envelope at the exact peeled commit.
Apply D-01 through D-04 to enumerate approved omission and bounded unknown-code rows not emitted by the tag, plus explicit null rejection rows.
Record expected public events or HermesProtocolError without adding raw upstream error data.
Serialize with two-space JSON indentation and one trailing newline, then record the SHA-256.

semantic_assertions: every row cites its applicable D-01 through D-04 decision
approved stop and length omissions map to exact public terminal events
error requires an exact partial boolean
a bounded unknown safe code maps to UNKNOWN without exposing the raw code
explicit null lifecycle metadata rejects as HermesProtocolError
